summary: postinstall pipes unpinned remote shell script to sh
details: On `npm install`, scripts/postinstall.js line 78 executes `npm install -g @opencode/cli 2>/dev/null || curl -fsSL https://opencode.ai/install.sh 2>/dev/null | sh`. The fallback fetches an unpinned shell script over HTTPS from opencode.ai — a third-party domain unrelated to this package's declared publisher (github.com/DeadJustLive/OpenPrompt-Lang) — with no version pin, no hash or signature check, and pipes the response body directly into `sh`. Whoever controls opencode.ai (or anyone able to MITM / hijack the domain) can run arbitrary code on every machine that installs this package. Additionally, the same line silently performs an unconsented global install of the unrelated `@opencode/cli` package, expanding the installer's trusted dependency surface without prompt or opt-out.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
